steps.t: Ânug-stazg can be found east and slightly north of Mithechad. Perindúr has asked you to scout out the path leading into Ânug-stazg and the camp-fires …
Perindúr is at Mithechad, west and slightly south of Ânug-stazg. You should return to Perindúr with your report of the Enemy's forces at Ânug-stazg.
